name: tellonce
description: Self-hosted marketplace for tellonce — automatic preference/pitfall/friction memory and enforcement for AI coding agents.

metadata.description: tellonce: records the corrections you make to your coding agent and (opt-in) enforces them. Safe-by-default observe mode.

plugins.name: tellonce
plugins.description: Automatic preference/pitfall/friction detection + memory enforcement (observe / enforce / full modes). Native on GitHub Copilot CLI.
